name: GPT Rosalind
description: GPT Rosalind is OpenAI's high-quality speech-to-text model built on GPT-4o audio capabilities. It's priced per token (input and output), making it suitable for workflows that benefit from token-level billing transparency.

details.name: availability
details.value: Research preview for qualified customers in ChatGPT, Codex, and the API through trusted access.

details.name: preview_billing
details.value: During research preview, usage does not consume existing credits or tokens (subject to abuse guardrails).
